Package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

Interface BeanTypeResolver

All Known Implementing Classes:
MarshallingContext
public interface BeanTypeResolver
Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-resolution operations the bean-property validation pass needs from the marshalling layer.

Implemented by the marshalling-side MarshallingContext so that BeanPropertyMeta.Builder#validate can stay free of direct MarshallingContext references and live in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.

The Object-typed counterpart on the Builder is what gets stored long-term; validate(...) narrows it to BeanTypeResolver just for the duration of the resolve+validate pass.

See Also:

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AnnotationProvider
    getAnnotationProvider()
    Returns the annotation provider used to read annotations during property validation.
    BeanInfo<?>
    objectType()
    Returns the type-info for Object.class (used as the fallback element/value type for raw/unparameterized collections and maps).
    BeanInfo<?>
    resolveType(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> lastBeanProp, ClassInfo type, TypeVariables typeVarImpls)
    Resolves the bean-property type-info for a property given its (optional) @BeanProp annotation and Java type.

  • Method Details

    • resolveType

      BeanInfo<?> resolveType(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> lastBeanProp, ClassInfo type, TypeVariables typeVarImpls)
      Resolves the bean-property type-info for a property given its (optional) @BeanProp annotation and Java type.
      Parameters:
      lastBeanProp - The last @BeanProp annotation found on the property's field/getter/setter, or null if none.
      type - The Java type of the property as derived from the field/getter/setter signature.
      typeVarImpls - Resolved type-variable substitutions for the enclosing class.
      Returns:
      The resolved type-info, or null if no resolution was possible.

    • objectType

      BeanInfo<?> objectType()
      Returns the type-info for Object.class (used as the fallback element/value type for raw/unparameterized collections and maps).
      Returns:
      Non-null type-info for Object.class.

    • getAnnotationProvider

      AnnotationProvider getAnnotationProvider()
      Returns the annotation provider used to read annotations during property validation.
      Returns:
      Non-null annotation provider.
